name: make-videogenerationmodal-20260406-1855
idea: Make VideoGenerationModal support two collapsible accordion sections: (1) Top section 'Shot Images' showing a batch image grid via ShotImagesEditor in read-only batch mode, (2) Bottom section 'Generation Settings' showing the current form content (BatchSettingsForm + MotionControl). Each section independently collapsible via defaultTopOpen/defaultBottomOpen props. When collapsed, each shows a compact summary (top: thumbnail strip + image count; bottom: model/frames/prompt one-liner). Current usage in VideoShotDisplay.tsx keeps current behavior (top closed, bottom open). Key files: VideoGenerationModal.tsx, VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx, useVideoGenerationModalController.ts. Generate button stays in always-visible footer.

last_gate.rationale: Plan is well-structured for a contained UI restructuring. Both flags are valid but easily addressed during execution without plan revision. FLAG-001 is solved by setting sensible prop defaults (defaultBottomOpen=true) in VideoGenerationModalProps so unupdated callers get current behavior. FLAG-002 is standard execution hygiene — the executor will update breaking tests as they encounter them.
last_gate.signals_assessment: Iteration 1 with weighted score 3.5. Two significant flags, both addressable at execution time rather than requiring plan restructuring. No recurring critiques, no scope creep, no debt overlap with escalated subsystems. Preflight passed on all checks. The plan's phased structure (data layer → components → wiring) is clean and the file scope is narrow (3 core files + 1-2 caller sites).
warnings: Executor must set defaultBottomOpen=true as the prop default in VideoGenerationModalProps so that callers in GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx and TimelineEditor.tsx maintain current behavior without code changes.
Executor must run existing Vitest suites (VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx, useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx) and update them to match the new component structure.

settled_decisions.decision: VideoGenerationModalProps defaults: defaultTopOpen=false, defaultBottomOpen=true. This preserves current UX for all callers without requiring caller-side changes.
settled_decisions.rationale: Ensures backward compatibility across all 3 render sites (VideoShotDisplay, GenerationsPaneGallery, TimelineEditor) without touching each caller.

settled_decisions.decision: Use controlled mode with external summary rendering rather than extending the shared CollapsibleSection component.
settled_decisions.rationale: Plan Option A avoids shared component changes and keeps the accordion summary logic local to the modal.

settled_decisions.decision: Executor must update VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx and useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx as part of the implementation, not defer to a separate step.
settled_decisions.rationale: These tests directly cover the changed surface and will break on the new component structure.

last_gate.orchestrator_guidance: First iteration; follow gate recommendation: PROCEED. Verify unresolved flags against the plan and project code before accepting.
